about.name: Ward Khaddour
about.summary: A passionate full-stack developer with experience in building modern web applications. I love creating scalable and maintainable software, exploring new technologies, and solving challenging problems.

skills.description: My toolkit for building amazing digital experiences

description: Developed and maintained multiple production-grade web applications and dashboards with a strong focus on scalability, performance, and maintainability.
Designed modular front-end architectures following Clean Architecture principles and reusable component-driven patterns.
Collaborated closely with designers and backend teams to ensure seamless UI/UX integration and consistent API contracts.
Implemented real-time features and optimized complex UI states using modern state management tools such as Zustand and React Query.
Improved overall application performance by up to 35% through render-time reduction and bundle optimization.
Mentored three interns, providing guidance on TypeScript, React best practices, and modern development workflows.
Actively participated in code reviews, sprint planning, and daily stand-ups to ensure alignment and effective collaboration across teams.
Contributed to the development of an Agile project management system by implementing UI components aligned with Kanban and Scrum workflows.
Collaborated with the design team to create responsive, accessible, and intuitive user interfaces.
Integrated front-end logic with backend APIs to enable dynamic, real-time updates and seamless user experiences.
Actively participated in daily scrum meetings and sprint reviews to ensure consistent progress and high-quality delivery.
Recognized as Employee of the Month for exceptional contributions and code quality.
Gained hands-on experience with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
Contributed to early-stage web projects under professional guidance.
Learned best practices for clean, maintainable front-end code and collaborative workflows.

educationList.description: Completed a comprehensive curriculum focused on software engineering principles, design patterns, object-oriented programming, databases, algorithms, and data structures.
